verses.text: For where two or three gather in my name, there am I with them.
I can do all things through him who strengthens me.
The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want.
Trust in the Lord with all your heart and lean not on your own understanding.
For I know the plans I have for you, plans to prosper you and not to harm you.
Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid, for the Lord will be with you.
The prayer of a righteous person is powerful and effective.

home.subtitle: Ore, conecte-se e fortaleça sua fé com milhares de irmãos ao redor do mundo.
home.whyChoose: Por Que Escolher Sigo com Fé?
home.shareText: Conheça o Sigo com Fé! Rede social cristã.
home.globalDesc: Conecte-se com cristãos de todo o mundo
home.forPastorsDesc: Ferramentas completas para gerenciar sua congregação, finanças, campanhas e muito mais.
home.featurePrayersDesc: Compartilhe seus pedidos e ore pelos irmãos. Veja o poder da oração coletiva e celebre as vitórias!
home.featureLiveDesc: Saiba quando seu pastor está orando em tempo real. Bolhas de oração sobem como incenso ao céu.
home.featureMapDesc: Encontre igrejas em qualquer cidade. Perfeito para viajantes e famílias em mudança.
home.featureDashboardDesc: Ferramentas completas de gestão para pastores: membros, finanças, campanhas e muito mais.
home.featureMuralDesc: Compartilhe testemunhos, louvores e versículos com a comunidade cristã.
home.featureKidsDesc: Histórias bíblicas, quiz interativo e atividades para as crianças aprenderem sobre a Bíblia!

pastorChat.title: Pastoral Chat
pastorChat.subtitle: Chat directly with a pastor. Automatic translation included.
pastorChat.waitingDesc: A pastor will join the conversation soon. Have faith!

pastorChat.introTitle: 🕊️ A Pastor Is Ready to Listen to You
pastorChat.introDesc: Sometimes life brings burdens too heavy to carry alone. Here you can have a confidential conversation with a pastor who will listen to you, advise you with biblical wisdom, and pray for you.
pastorChat.introVerse1: Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest. — Matthew 11:28
pastorChat.introFeatures:
💜 Confidential and secure conversation
🌍 Automatic translation in 15 languages
🙏 Volunteer pastors from around the world
pastorChat.introVerse2: Plans fail for lack of counsel, but with many advisers they succeed. — Proverbs 15:22

helpRequests.title: 🆘 How Do Help Requests Work?
helpRequests.subtitle: People in need of spiritual support and prayer. Respond with love.
helpRequests.howWorks: This is a safe and confidential space where believers in difficulty can share their challenges and receive pastoral support. Each request is an opportunity to demonstrate the love of Christ.
helpRequests.statusPending: 🔴 Pending — Waiting for a pastor to attend
helpRequests.statusInProgress: 🟡 In Progress — A pastor is already caring
helpRequests.statusResolved: 🟢 Resolved — The person received the necessary support
helpRequests.verse: Levai as cargas uns dos outros e assim cumprireis a lei de Cristo. — Gálatas 6:2

consecration.title: Consecration
consecration.subtitle: Fasting and prayer - strengthen your faith
consecration.noOneYet: No one consecrating yet. Be the first!
consecration.conclusion: Fasting: It's not a diet. It's not an empty sacrifice. It's obedience, alignment and dependence on God.
consecration.powerDesc: Fasting is one of the most powerful spiritual weapons God has given us. It's not just abstaining from food — it's surrendering entirely to God, seeking His presence and His will above all else.
consecration.beginFastingDesc: Tap the flame button below to indicate that you are starting your consecration (fasting and prayer).
consecration.flameRisesDesc: While you are consecrating, a flame of fire rises on the screen representing you. Each person is a flame!
consecration.endFastingDesc: When finished, tap the button again to end. Your flame goes out, but your prayer remains!
consecration.morePeople: The more people consecrating, the more flames of fire rise! Each flame is a person in prayer.
consecration.currentlyConsecrating: You are consecrating now! Tap the button when you finish.
consecration.touchButton: Tap the button above to START your consecration
consecration.activeFastingDesc: each person = a flame of fire 🔥
consecration.spiritualStrength: Strengthens the spirit and subdues the flesh
consecration.mentalHumility: Humbling of the soul and inner peace
consecration.breakGlory: Everything for the glory of God

reflection.title: Reflection with God
reflection.subtitle: Take a few minutes to reflect deeply
reflection.q1: If today were your last day, what would you say to God?
reflection.q1verse: For God so loved the world - John 3:16
reflection.q2: What prevents you from surrendering your life to Christ?
reflection.q2verse: Come to me all who are weary - Matthew 11:28
reflection.q3: How do you want to be remembered in eternity?
reflection.q3verse: I am the resurrection and the life - John 11:25
reflection.loginRequired: Log in to write and share your reflection.
reflection.noCommunity: Be the first to share a reflection today!

days.q1: If today were your last day, what would you say to God?
days.q1verse: For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son — John 3:16
days.q2: What is keeping you from fully surrendering your life to Christ?
days.q2verse: Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened — Matthew 11:28
days.q3: How have you shown love to others this week?
days.q3verse: Love one another as I have loved you — John 13:34

days.q1: What are you truly grateful for today?
days.q1verse: Give thanks in all circumstances, for this is God's will — 1 Thessalonians 5:18
days.q2: Where do you feel God's presence in your life right now?
days.q2verse: Where two or three gather in my name, there am I — Matthew 18:20
days.q3: What sin do you need to place in God's hands today?
days.q3verse: If we confess our sins, he is faithful and just — 1 John 1:9

days.q1: How can you be a light today in your environment?
days.q1verse: You are the light of the world — Matthew 5:14
days.q2: What has the Bible been speaking to your heart lately?
days.q2verse: Your word is a lamp for my feet, a light on my path — Psalm 119:105
days.q3: Is there someone you need to forgive today?
days.q3verse: Forgive one another, just as in Christ God forgave you — Ephesians 4:32

days.q1: Which promise of God do you need to hold onto today?
days.q1verse: I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord — Jeremiah 29:11
days.q2: What is God calling you to do that you haven't done yet?
days.q2verse: I can do all this through him who gives me strength — Philippians 4:13
days.q3: How is your quiet time with God going this week?
days.q3verse: But when you pray, go into your room, close the door — Matthew 6:6

days.q1: What do you need to let go and trust to God?
days.q1verse: Commit your way to the Lord; trust in him — Psalm 37:5
days.q2: How has your faith grown in the past month?
days.q2verse: Faith is confidence in what we hope for — Hebrews 11:1
days.q3: Are you using your gifts to serve others?
days.q3verse: Each of you should use whatever gift you have received to serve others — 1 Peter 4:10

days.q1: What stole your peace this week? How can God restore it?
days.q1verse: And the peace of God, which transcends all understanding — Philippians 4:7
days.q2: How have you witnessed Christ to people around you?
days.q2verse: Go into all the world and preach the gospel — Mark 16:15
days.q3: In what area of your life do you still need transformation?
days.q3verse: Do not conform to the pattern of this world, but be transformed — Romans 12:2

days.q1: What has God revealed about himself to you this week?
days.q1verse: Then you will know the truth, and the truth will set you free — John 8:32
days.q2: How can you strengthen your family in faith?
days.q2verse: As for me and my household, we will serve the Lord — Joshua 24:15
days.q3: In what area do you need God's grace the most?
days.q3verse: My grace is sufficient for you, for my power is made perfect in weakness — 2 Corinthians 12:9

landing.subtitle: Have you felt alone, with no one to pray with? Here there is always someone for you.
landing.verse: "For where two or three gather in my name, there am I with them." — Mt 18:20
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to grow in faith
landing.testimoniesTitle: What our brothers and sisters say
landing.ctaTitle: Join the Christian community that grows in God's love
landing.ctaSubtitle: Sign up today. It is free. It is Christian. It is for you.
landing.f1desc: Share and receive prayer from the community. Never pray alone.
landing.f2desc: Ask questions about the Bible with Christian AI.
landing.f3desc: Commit yourself to God. Fasting and prayer records in community.
landing.f4desc: Talk directly with a pastor. Real-time counseling.
landing.f5desc: Worship library in multiple languages. Worship wherever you are.
landing.f6desc: Connect with Christians from Brazil, Europe, Africa and all over the world.
landing.headline2: Maybe it is not by chance that you arrived here.
landing.whyTitle: Why Sigo com Fé instead of Instagram?
landing.whySubtitle: Ever tried using Instagram or WhatsApp to grow spiritually? Sigo com Fé was built specifically for Christians who want to strengthen their faith every day.
landing.why1desc: No memes, no politics, no inappropriate content. Only what builds you up.
landing.why2desc: Real prayer requests, answered by real Christians — in real time.
landing.why3desc: Talk to a pastor privately and for free. You are not alone.
landing.why4desc: Christians from Brazil, Portugal, Germany, Africa and more — united in faith.
landing.msg1: If you feel lonely, this place is for you. God has not forgotten you.
landing.msg2: Maybe it is not by chance that you arrived here.
landing.msg3: Here your faith grows every day.
landing.title1: Don't walk alone in your faith
landing.prayerSent: To see responses, create your account:
landing.cta1: I want to join and not be alone
landing.benefitsTitle: This is not just a social network
landing.urgency: Right now there are people waiting to pray with you
landing.notCasual: You did not arrive here by chance
landing.ctaFinalText: God can use this moment to change something in your life.

testimonies.demo1: Encontrei paz e comunidade nesta plataforma. Minhas orações foram ouvidas e respondidas.
testimonies.demo2: A IA Bíblica me ajudou a entender melhor as escrituras e fortalecer minha fé diariamente.
testimonies.demo3: Encontrei minha igreja local e agora sou membro ativo da comunidade cristã online e presencial.

bible_challenge.title: Bible Challenge
bible_challenge.subtitle: Test your knowledge of the Word!
bible_challenge.question: Question

desafio.title: Bible Challenge
desafio.subtitle: Test your knowledge of the Word!
desafio.question: Question
desafio.m1desc: Answer 5 Bible questions. You have 15 seconds per question. The faster you answer, the more points you earn!
desafio.m2desc: Fast correct answer = 10 pts. Slow correct answer = 5 pts. Wrong answer = 0 pts. Maximum 50 pts per game!
desafio.m3desc: Create Room: create a room and share the code with a friend. Join: enter a room code. Play with someone: find a random opponent!
desafio.m4desc: Your points accumulate each game. Play more to climb the ranking and become the Bible Master!
desafio.m5desc: Unlock special achievements by playing! Get answer streaks, play perfect games and much more!
desafio.m6desc: Choose a specific book to practice or play with All books!
